productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Polo Blue Tshirts
description: CompositionDark blue t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar, buttoned rugged chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, vented hem and embroidered Big Ben logo on left chestFittingComfortWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroiderySubtle and stylish, this blue polo T-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the thickly embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your regal style. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'', Shoulders-18"
